notes: Swiss pioneer in plant stem cell biotechnology and the absolute leader in this space. Mibelle Biochemistry invented plant stem cell cosmetic actives and continues to innovate with PhytoCellTec™ Exosomes (Nov 2024) and SenoCellTec™ (2026). Their exosome technology is particularly significant — plant-derived exosomes that act on both epidermis and dermis simultaneously. Essential supplier for any premium anti-aging formulation. Part of Mibelle Group.
